mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, oauth_provider, oauth_subject, nickname, profile_image_url, birthdate, terms_agreed_at, privacy_agreed_at, marketing_agreed_at, personal_invite_code, is_anonymized, created_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT id, email, password, oauth_provider, oauth_subject, nickname, profile_image_url, birthdate, terms_agreed_at, privacy_agreed_at, marketing_agreed_at, personal_invite_code, is_anonymized, created_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET is_anonymized = true, nickname = '언노운', anonymized_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
